caption: A person wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic and text on it, along with a lanyard around their neck, is standing indoors, likely in a presentation or lecture setting. They appear to be speaking or explaining something, as they gesture with their hands while looking towards an audience or a screen that is not visible in the frame. The background includes a whiteboard and a computer monitor, suggesting an educational or professional environment. The individual seems engaged and focused on their topic, possibly using the monitor for reference or to display information related to their discussion.
